discover.title: Discover Our Olive Oil
discover.content:
Our extra virgin olive oil comes from carefully selected olives harvested during the second season — the precise moment when green, red, and black varieties reach their perfect balance of maturity. This meticulous timing ensures an oil that is harmonious, stable, and generously aromatic.

A Unique Blend

ZABRA blends Arbequina and Local olive varieties to achieve a stable golden color and a smooth, subtly fruity flavor profile... Read more

ZABRA blends Arbequina and Local olive varieties to achieve a stable golden color and a smooth, subtly fruity flavor profile with a peppery finish. Each batch is pressed within hours of harvest to preserve the full freshness of the aromas.

Show less

Tasting Tips

To reveal its full richness, drizzle it over warm bread, a fresh salad, or a tagine... Read more

To reveal its full richness, drizzle it over warm bread, a fresh salad, or a tagine at the end of cooking. It elevates every dish without overpowering the flavors.

Show less

why-zabira.title: Why Choose ZABRA?
why-zabira.content:
At ZABRA, every bottle tells the story of an artisanal craft passed down through generations. We don't mass-produce — we select.

Second Season Harvest

Unlike early industrial harvests, we wait for the second season of maturation... Read more

Unlike early industrial harvests, we wait for the second season of maturation. This longer process allows the olives to develop superior aromatic complexity, with notes of ripe fruit, fresh grass, and sweet almond.

Show less

Supervised Extraction in Beni Mellal

Our olives are cold-pressed in the mills of Beni Mellal, a region renowned for centuries... Read more

Our olives are cold-pressed in the mills of Beni Mellal, a region renowned for centuries for the exceptional quality of its olive groves. Each extraction is personally supervised to guarantee acidity below 0.8%.

Show less

Travel-Ready Packaging

Zabra olive oil is stored in food-grade steel canisters designed for travel... Read more

Zabra olive oil is stored in food-grade steel canisters designed for travel. Durable and secure, they protect the oil from light and heat, and can be placed directly in luggage without additional wrapping — making them ideal for long journeys.

Show less

Crafted in Morocco, designed to travel the world.

recipe.title: Olive Oil Recipes
recipe.content:
Quick Mediterranean Marinade

A simple, fragrant marinade to elevate grilled meats and vegetables. Read more

A simple, fragrant marinade to elevate grilled meats and vegetables.

  • 4 tbsp ZABRA extra virgin olive oil
  • 3 finely minced garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp ground cumin
  • Juice of one fresh lemon
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper

Mix all ingredients and marinate your meats or vegetables for 20 to 30 minutes. Grill over high heat for perfect caramelization.

Show less

Daily Wellness Ritual

One tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil every morning on an empty stomach offers remarkable benefits... Read more

One tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil every morning on an empty stomach offers remarkable benefits:

  • Supports digestion and protects the gastric lining
  • Promotes heart health through omega-9 fatty acids
  • Hydrates skin from within for a radiant complexion
Show less

ZABRA Signature Vinaigrette

Emulsify 3 parts ZABRA oil with 1 part balsamic vinegar, a touch of Dijon mustard... Read more

Emulsify 3 parts ZABRA oil with 1 part balsamic vinegar, a touch of Dijon mustard, and a pinch of sea salt. Perfect over an heirloom tomato salad or fresh mozzarella.

Show less
